meaning: n.冰岛(欧洲岛名,在大西洋北部,近北极圈)
examples: The trawler was fishing off the coast of Iceland.
A young mother has flown to Iceland to unravel the mystery of her husband's disappearance.
Iceland is the largest island in the world.
And as tourism explodes in Iceland, it is set to be a continuing problem.
Getting on a horse in Iceland is not like being initiated into an exclusive equine cult.
